topic: Myth: 'A Facebook page is the same as a website'

script.hook: Your Facebook page is NOT a website.
beats: Facebook can delete your page tomorrow. You own nothing there.
Google ignores Facebook pages. A real website gets you found in search.
Your website works 24/7, builds trust, and belongs to you alone.
